mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_sales_history (stat_date, product_id, category, sales_qty, sales_amount) SELECT #{targetDate}, oi.menu_id, c.type, SUM(oi.quantity), SUM(oi.price * oi.quantity) FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id INNER JOIN payment p ON o.session_id = p.session_id INNER JOIN menu m ON oi.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN category c ON m.category_id = c.id WHERE p.status = 'DONE' AND p.paid_at >= #{targetDate} AND p.paid_at < DATE_ADD(#{targetDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) /* 🚫 '인원 추가(GUEST)'와 '게임 대여(GAME)'는 매출 통계에서 제외 */ AND c.type NOT IN ('GUEST', 'GAME') GROUP BY oi.menu_id, c.type ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE sales_qty = VALUES(sales_qty), sales_amount = VALUES(sales_amount)
mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(stat_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as statDate, total_revenue as totalRevenue, order_count as orderCount, visit_count as visitCount, avg_usage_time as avgUsageTime FROM daily_sales_summary WHERE stat_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 6 DAY) AND #{endDate} ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT m.name as menuName, ish.sales_qty as salesQty, ish.sales_amount as salesAmount FROM item_sales_history ish INNER JOIN menu m ON ish.product_id = m.id WHERE ish.stat_date = #{targetDate} ORDER BY ish.sales_qty DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.name as menuName, SUM(ish.sales_qty) as salesQty FROM item_sales_history ish INNER JOIN menu m ON ish.product_id = m.id WHERE ish.stat_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) GROUP BY ish.product_id, m.name ORDER BY salesQty DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT category as categoryName, SUM(sales_amount) as totalAmount FROM item_sales_history WHERE stat_date = #{targetDate} GROUP BY category

SELECT g.name AS gameName, COUNT(gh.id) AS rentCount FROM game_history gh INNER JOIN game_item gi ON gh.game_item_id = gi.id INNER JOIN game g ON gi.game_id = g.id WHERE YEAR(gh.rented_at) = YEAR(#{targetDate}) AND MONTH(gh.rented_at) = MONTH(#{targetDate}) GROUP BY g.id, g.name ORDER BY rentCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
